meta.name: EncounterDesign_v1
meta.description: A prompt framework for crafting detailed and actionable Dungeons & Dragons encounters.

inputs.name: encounter_concept
inputs.label: Encounter Concept
inputs.description: The core idea or theme for the encounter (e.g., 'Ambush in a goblin warren', 'Negotiating with a suspicious dragon').
inputs.default: An unexpected challenge in a forgotten ruin.

inputs.name: party_level
inputs.label: Party Level
inputs.description: The average level of the player characters, used to tailor challenge difficulty.

inputs.name: difficulty_level
inputs.label: Difficulty Level
inputs.description: The intended difficulty of the encounter, influencing DCs, opponent strength, and rewards.

inputs.name: encounter_focus
inputs.label: Encounter Focus
inputs.description: The primary style of challenge for the encounter.

outputs.name: setting_the_scene
outputs.label: Setting the Scene
outputs.description: Provides the location, sensory details, and the primary objective of the encounter.

fields.name: location_description
fields.label: Location Description
fields.description: A vivid description of the environment, focusing on relevant sensory details.

fields.name: primary_objective
fields.label: Primary Objective
fields.description: A clear statement of the main challenge or goal for the players.

outputs.name: environmental_effect
outputs.label: Environmental Effect
outputs.description: Any significant environmental effects that impact gameplay and their rules. Null if not applicable.

fields.name: rules_and_modifiers
fields.label: Rules and Modifiers
fields.description: Straightforward rules for how the effect impacts gameplay (e.g., skill checks, combat).

outputs.name: challenges
outputs.label: Challenges
outputs.description: A series of interconnected challenges (skill checks, puzzles, combat, etc.) that form the core of the encounter.

fields.name: challenge_type
fields.label: Challenge Type
fields.description: The category of the challenge, e.g., 'Skill Check', 'Combat', 'Puzzle', 'Roleplay'.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Challenge Description
fields.description: A description of the challenge or what the players must do.

fields.name: implementation_rules
fields.label: Implementation Rules
fields.description: Concise instructions and rules, including specific skill check DCs and combat mechanics.

fields.name: resolution_guidelines
fields.label: Resolution Guidelines
fields.description: Step-by-step instructions for resolving the challenge.

fields.name: success
fields.label: Success Consequence
fields.description: The immediate outcome and consequences for succeeding at the challenge.

fields.name: failure
fields.label: Failure Consequence
fields.description: The immediate outcome and consequences for failing the challenge.

fields.name: opponent_info
fields.label: Opponent Information
fields.description: Details of the opponent(s), if any, specific to this challenge. Null for non-opposition challenges.

fields.name: description_or_statblock
fields.label: Description / Statblock
fields.description: A succinct description or statblock for the opponent.

fields.name: tactics_and_motives
fields.label: Tactics & Motives
fields.description: Key tactics, motives, and goals of the opponent.

fields.name: xp_reward
fields.label: XP Reward
fields.description: The experience points awarded for overcoming this specific challenge.

outputs.name: npcs_and_monsters
outputs.label: NPCs and Monsters
outputs.description: Concise descriptions of other relevant NPCs or monsters involved, detailing their personalities and motives.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The name or title of the NPC or monster.

fields.name: personality_and_motive
fields.label: Personality & Motive
fields.description: Exploration of their personality, motives, and goals.

fields.name: interaction_style
fields.label: Interaction Style
fields.description: Notes on how they might interact with the players.

outputs.name: total_xp_reward
outputs.label: Total XP Reward
outputs.description: The cumulative XP total for all challenges in the encounter.

outputs.name: outcome_and_transition
outputs.label: Outcome and Transition
outputs.description: A summary of potential outcomes and suggestions for how the encounter can lead into the next scene.
